item.title: Barcode Maker Applications [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Maker Applications [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: professionalbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Maker Applications
(Utilities)
Company provides professional Barcode Maker Software with advance barcode technology that is available on website www.barcodemaker.org supported by Windows operation system to quickly designs and prints any type of barcode label as per industries needs without any help of technical assistance. Label maker program provides option to generate tags list using different series including sequential, constant and random series.

[read more]
item.description:
Barcode Maker Applications
(Utilities)
Company provides professional Barcode Maker Software with advance barcode technology that is available on website www.barcodemaker.org supported by Windows operation system to quickly designs and prints any type of barcode label as per industries needs without any help of technical assistance. Label maker program provides option to generate tags list using different series including sequential, constant and random series.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Barcode Maker Applications
(Utilities)
Company provides professional Barcode Maker Software with advance barcode technology that is available on website www.barcodemaker.org supported by Windows operation system to quickly designs and prints any type of barcode label as per industries needs without any help of technical assistance. Label maker program provides option to generate tags list using different series including sequential, constant and random series.

[read more]

item.title: Packaging Barcode Design Application [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Packaging Barcode Design Application [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesystem
item.itunes:summary:
Packaging Barcode Design Application
(Office Apps)
www.barcodesystem.biz offers Packaging Barcode Tags generator software which offers advance designing object such as line, color, image, text, pencil, size, pencil and graphic for creating high resolution stickers in sequential series.

[read more]
item.description:
Packaging Barcode Design Application
(Office Apps)
www.barcodesystem.biz offers Packaging Barcode Tags generator software which offers advance designing object such as line, color, image, text, pencil, size, pencil and graphic for creating high resolution stickers in sequential series.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Packaging Barcode Design Application
(Office Apps)
www.barcodesystem.biz offers Packaging Barcode Tags generator software which offers advance designing object such as line, color, image, text, pencil, size, pencil and graphic for creating high resolution stickers in sequential series.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Photo Regainer Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Photo Regainer Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Photo Regainer Tool
(Utilities)
Are you looking for best and cost efficient program for restoration of missing pictures which are accidently deleted from memory card of digital camera? Don't worry just take a look at www.driverecoverysoftware.org which presents highly reliable and easy to use Photos Recovery Software to get back erased digital pictures which are lost due to malware infection or unintentionally pressed delete all button of your digital camera device.
[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Are you looking for best and cost efficient program for restoration of missing pictures which are accidently deleted from memory card of digital camera? [read more]

Digital Camera Photo Regainer Tool
(Utilities)
Are you looking for best and cost efficient program for restoration of missing pictures which are accidently deleted from memory card of digital camera? item.title: Qt5 Configuration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Qt5 Configuration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt5 Configuration Tool
(Utilities)
This program allows users to configure Qt5 settings (theme, font, icons, etc.) under DE/WM without Qt integration.
[b]Requirements:[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 5.9.0
- qtsvg >= 5.9.0
- qttools >= 5.9.0 (For build only)

[b]Translation:[/b]
[url]https://www.transifex.com/projects/p/qt5ct/[/url]

[b]Downloads:[/b]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qt5ct/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qt5 Configuration Tool
(Utilities)
This program allows users to configure Qt5 settings (theme, font, icons, etc.) under DE/WM without Qt integration.
[b]Requirements:[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 5.9.0
- qtsvg >= 5.9.0
- qttools >= 5.9.0 (For build only)

[b]Translation:[/b]
[url]https://www.transifex.com/projects/p/qt5ct/[/url]

[b]Downloads:[/b]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qt5ct/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qt5 Configuration Tool
(Utilities)
This program allows users to configure Qt5 settings (theme, font, icons, etc.) under DE/WM without Qt integration.
[b]Requirements:[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 5.9.0
- qtsvg >= 5.9.0
- qttools >= 5.9.0 (For build only)

[b]Translation:[/b]

item.title: Checkers Shells [Chess]

item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Checkers Shells
(Chess)
Linux offline version of the popular game
This underwater-inspired checker game lets you play checker using these shells.

item.title: Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Henry is taken to The Wall, a highly secured prison complex said to hold some of the most notorious criminals — and tries to escape from there, with or without an ally.
[read more]
